revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ferries and boats for Miyajima]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Ferries and boats for Miyajima]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{| class="toccolours" style="margin:0 auto 0 auto; border:1px solid skyblue; clear:both;" | style="text-align:center; background:skyblue;" colspan="2"|'''Ferries and boats for [[Itsukushima|Miyajima]] ([[Itsukushima Shrine]])''' |- | [[JR Miyajima Ferry]] – [[Miyajima Matsudai Kisen]] – [[First Beach]] – [[Aqua Net Hiroshima]] |}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan transport templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ferries_and_boats_for_Miyajima here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
